bugs.root_cause: The folder had no local project marker, so OpenWolf selected a parent project root in the user home directory.
bugs.fix: Created a temporary .project marker, ran openwolf init successfully in anil-lib, removed the marker, and rescanned anatomy.

bugs.error_message: zsh: parse error near ')' while running the initial secret-scan regex
bugs.root_cause: The shell command mixed nested single and double quotes inside one regular expression.
bugs.fix: Split the scan into two simpler ripgrep expressions; the rerun completed and found no credentials.

bugs.error_message: git diff --cached --check reports trailing whitespace in imported research Markdown files
bugs.root_cause: The source research documents already contain trailing spaces and blank lines.
bugs.fix: Preserved the imported source text unchanged and treated this as a non-blocking content-format warning for the initial archive commit.

bugs.error_message: remote: Invalid username or token. Password authentication is not supported for Git operations.
bugs.root_cause: The repository used an HTTPS remote before GitHub CLI credentials were configured; no SSH private key was available and the connected GitHub app could not write repository contents.
bugs.fix: Installed GitHub CLI 2.95.0, authenticated the nacianil0 account through GitHub device login, configured HTTPS Git credentials, and pushed main successfully.

bugs.error_message: fatal: could not read Username for 'https://github.com': Device not configured
bugs.root_cause: The GitHub CLI session was valid, but the Git credential helper entry was missing from the active global Git configuration.
bugs.fix: Ran `gh auth setup-git` to register `gh auth git-credential`, then pushed commit 58fe8dd successfully.

bugs.error_message: ESLint: '.wolf/hooks/*.js' Empty block statement (no-empty); 'last' assigned but never used in reader.spec.ts
bugs.root_cause: The flat ESLint config did not ignore OpenWolf's own .wolf/hooks scripts (which use empty catch blocks), and the e2e spec declared an unused 'last' binding.
bugs.fix: Added '.wolf/**' to the eslint ignores list and removed the unused 'last' variable from the Playwright spec.

bugs.error_message: Playwright: expect(locator('main button[aria-pressed="true"]')).toBeVisible() failed - element(s) not found after clicking the completion toggle
bugs.root_cause: Against `next dev`, the click on the completion button landed before React finished hydrating, so the onClick handler never ran and aria-pressed stayed false.
bugs.fix: Wrapped the toggle in expect(async () => { if (notPressed) await click(); await expect(pressed).toBeVisible(); }).toPass(), so the click retries until hydration completes while only clicking when still unpressed (never double-toggling).

bugs.root_cause: Async call without await — returned Promise instead of value
Async call without await — returned Promise instead of value
Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)
